hero.heading: Design & Build Specialists
hero.subheading: for Hospitality and Residential Projects in London
hero.body: From planning permission to final fit-out, we deliver high-quality refurbishments with speed, precision and full project control.

about.label: About Us
about.quote: One team. Full control. From planning permission to final fit-out — we deliver exceptional results for hospitality and residential clients across London.

whyUs.label: Why Work With Us
whyUs.card1: 7+ years of experience across UK and European markets
whyUs.card2: Specialists in pubs, restaurants and Airbnb refurbishments
whyUs.card3: In-house architects, engineers, builders and specialist trades
whyUs.card4: Fast-track delivery with minimal business downtime

process.label: Our Process
process.heading: A Clear Process,
process.subheading: From First Call to Final Handover
process.body: We believe great results come from a structured approach. Here's how we work:

step01.title: Initial Call
step01.body: We learn about your property, goals and budget.

step02.title: Site Visit
step02.body: We assess feasibility and take measurements on site.

step03.title: Concept & Strategy
step03.body: We define design direction and the best approach for your investment.

step04.title: Design & Planning
step04.body: Drawings, technical details and planning permissions managed for you.

step05.title: Specification & Procurement
step05.body: We source materials, finishes and furniture through trusted suppliers.

step06.title: Detailed Costing
step06.body: Clear, itemised quotation with no hidden costs.

step07.title: Programme of Works
step07.body: A detailed schedule aligned with your deadlines.

step08.title: Build & Delivery
step08.body: On time, on budget, to the highest standards.

header.label: Who We Are
header.heading: About Workhorse Crew Ltd
header.body: A London-based design and build company specialising in hospitality and residential refurbishments.

story.label: Our Story
story.heading: We are a London-based design and build company specialising in hospitality and residential refurbishments.
story.body1: With over 7 years of experience working across the UK and Spain, we combine European design standards with the technical expertise and regulatory knowledge required to deliver exceptional results in London.
story.body2: Our in-house team of architects, engineers, skilled builders and specialist trades gives us the ability to manage every aspect of your project under one roof — from the first sketch to the final snag. This integrated approach means better communication, faster timelines and no costly handoff delays between separate contractors.

team.label: Our Team
team.heading: Our In-House Team
team.intro: We are proud to have a fully integrated team that covers every discipline your project needs:

stats.stat3: Residential & Airbnb Projects in the Last 12 Months

values.label: Our Values
values.heading: How We Work
values.body: We do not believe in cutting corners, overpromising or passing problems down the line. We take full ownership of every project we accept — and we build spaces that perform, last and add real value to your property.
values.quote: "From concept to completion — one team, one process, total control."

header.label: Our Services
header.heading: End-to-End Construction and Refurbishment Services in London
header.body: At Workhorse Crew, we manage every stage of your project in-house — from initial design and planning permissions through to construction and final fit-out. This means faster delivery, tighter cost control and one point of contact from start to finish.

service01.label: Service 01
service01.heading: Design & Planning
service01.body: We handle the entire design and planning process, ensuring your project is compliant, efficient and ready for construction from day one.

service02.label: Service 02
service02.heading: Hospitality Fit-Outs
service02.body: We are specialists in fast, high-quality pub fit-out and restaurant refurbishment in London, built around one priority: minimising your downtime. Whether you are refurbishing a pub, a restaurant or a commercial retail unit, our in-house team coordinates every trade to keep your project on programme.

service03.label: Service 03
service03.heading: Residential & Airbnb
service03.body: We transform properties into high-value homes and high-performing rental investments. From full residential refurbishments to Airbnb property renovation in London, we deliver quality finishes on time and on budget — ideal for buy-to-let and short-term rental landlords.

service04.label: Service 04
service04.heading: Procurement, Logistics & Assembly
service04.body: One of our key differentiators is full supply chain management. We source, deliver and install everything your project needs — materials, fixtures, furniture and fittings — through our network of trusted suppliers. This turnkey fit-out service means no third-party delays, no coordination gaps, just seamless delivery from start to finish.

service05.label: Service 05
service05.heading: Maintenance & Repair
service05.body: Keeping your property in peak condition is just as important as the build itself. Our maintenance and repair service gives landlords, business owners and property managers a reliable, responsive team for everything from planned upkeep to urgent remedial works — all delivered to the same standard as our fit-out projects.
